fomod.Name: marth Requiem Overhaul
fomod.Author: marth
fomod.Description:
A load-order mod that rebalances Requiem's late-game power scaling. Early and mid game are untouched; every feature gates on endgame investment, so you keep ascending while enemies keep their Requiem lethality.
Core features: - Elemental resistance cap removed; resistance above 100% absorbs that element's incoming damage as healing (1% per point over 100, full absorb at a configurable resistance, default 200%). Covers spells, enchantments, drains, and poisons - Physical DR scales past the engine's 75% armor cap for you and your followers only, gated and ceilinged by your armor mastery. The armor rating for 99% DR is auto-calibrated from your load order's best gear and is MCM-tunable; the curve below the cap is unchanged and enemies never benefit - 14-skill Mastery system: each skill unlocks at base 100 and advances through real use. Weapon XP is damage-scaled (normalized per hit, so overkill on weak enemies earns nothing and 1H/2H train at parity); magic XP is weighted by magicka spent. Bonuses at full mastery: weapons +50% damage, armor +300 rating, magic +50 effective skill, crafting +25%, plus a Speech barter ladder - Vendor gold doubled in memory at load, adapting to any load order - Quality of life: party-wide +150 carry weight and 66% arrow recovery - MCM: live feature toggles, per-skill mastery progress and tuning sliders, and a Live Status panel showing your real DR% and per-element absorb - Optional Experience.ini: same total leveling speed as Faster Leveling, weighted toward kills and quests over pure exploration
Requires: SKSE64, SkyUI 5.2+ (MCM), Custom Skills Framework (Mastery), powerofthree's Papyrus Extender, and PapyrusUtil. Developed against the LoreRim modlist on Skyrim SE 1.6.1170.
